playbook.intent: Senior rotating off a project → produces a self-contained pack that lets the next person ship within a week.
playbook.scope: Doc sprint produced when a senior is rotating off (vacation, next engagement, or full handoff). Output: a self-contained pack — ADRs, design docs, onboarding plan, dark-knowledge notes, shadow-session runbook — so the next person ships within a week. Used independently of the 3-week formal client handover.

success-criteria.criterion: Self-contained pack readable by a new joiner

stage.name: Inventory
stage.intent: Audit what exists vs what's only in your head.

tasks.task: Identify gaps where docs trail reality
Plan the project-closure-adjacent steps from existing methodology

stage.decision-gate: Advance only after every active module is listed.

stage.name: Refresh docs
stage.intent: Close the gap between docs and reality.

tasks.task: Backfill ADRs for last 3 months of decisions
Apply design-docs patterns to refresh stale docs
Document scope boundaries (what was NOT built)
Write design docs for any module without one

stage.decision-gate: Advance when a stranger can read the docs and answer top-10 questions unaided.

stage.name: Dark knowledge + shadow
stage.intent: Capture the things never written down and arrange one shadow session.

tasks.task: Run dark-knowledge extraction interview with yourself (or a peer)
Document gotchas: cron quirks, vendor flakes, weird ports
Sketch shadow-session runbook for the rotation

stage.decision-gate: Done when the pack is single-link shareable AND a peer has spot-checked it.

extra.value: [Full project closure — that's a bigger ceremony, Code refactoring before handoff — only documentation, Hiring the replacement — handled outside]
[Rotation date known and ≥1 week away, Existing docs accessible and editable, Successor candidate identified (even if not finalised)]

[Treating handover as 'I'll write up next week' — never happens, 'Documenting code but not the calendar quirks (vendor freezes, cron windows)', No shadow session — the successor learns the bug list the hard way]
['Could a new joiner ship a PR by day 5 using only this pack?', 'Did I write down the things I''d whisper if I were on the phone?', 'Did a peer spot-check the pack before I rotated?']

{human: faion get-content pre-handover-documentation-pack --format md, agent: faion get-content pre-handover-documentation-pack --format context, json: faion get-content pre-handover-documentation-pack --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P4 outsource-specialist persona, atomic angle'}]
